title: Araujo heading to the World Cup
original_text:
Another Barça player is heading to the 2026 World Cup. Ronald Araújo has been called up by Uruguay for this summer’s international tournament. Marcelo Biels a has included him in his 26-man squad as they prepare for a competition that gets underway on 11 June.

It will be the defender’s second World Cup. He was also included in Uruguay’s squad for the previous edition, but did not play a single minute after arriving at the tournament carrying an injury. As a result, the Barça number 4 will be hoping to make his World Cup debut in this latest edition of one of international football’s most prestigious tournaments.

Marcelo Bielsa’s side have been drawn in Group H alongside Saudi Arabia, Cape Verde and Spain , whose squad includes eight Barça players. There will therefore be a blaugrana clash in the group stage of the tournament, which is being held in the United States, Mexico and Canada.
